name: flyfus-content-agent
description: Flyfus SEO/GEO content generation engine — MySQL-only runtime, OpenClaw execution layer, local read-only Viewer. Web project integrates via MySQL only.

scripts.db:ping: cd workflow_py && uv run contentflow db ping
scripts.db:init: cd workflow_py && uv run contentflow db init
scripts.db:migrate: cd workflow_py && uv run contentflow db migrate
scripts.db:list: cd workflow_py && uv run contentflow db list
scripts.db:show: cd workflow_py && uv run contentflow db show
scripts.engine:daily: cd workflow_py && uv run contentflow engine daily
scripts.engine:batch: cd workflow_py && uv run contentflow engine batch
scripts.engine:graph: cd workflow_py && uv run contentflow graph plan
scripts.engine:report: cd workflow_py && uv run contentflow engine report
scripts.sources:collect: cd workflow_py && uv run contentflow sources collect
scripts.sources:check: cd workflow_py && uv run contentflow sources check
scripts.sources:fix: cd workflow_py && uv run contentflow sources fix
scripts.sources:backfill-canonical: cd workflow_py && uv run contentflow sources backfill-canonical
scripts.sources:resolve: cd workflow_py && uv run contentflow sources resolve
scripts.topics:generate: cd workflow_py && uv run contentflow topics generate
scripts.jobs:create: cd workflow_py && uv run contentflow jobs create
scripts.jobs:run: cd workflow_py && uv run contentflow jobs run
scripts.factcheck:run: cd workflow_py && uv run contentflow factcheck run
scripts.channels:generate: cd workflow_py && uv run contentflow channels generate
scripts.score:seo-geo: cd workflow_py && uv run contentflow score seo-geo
scripts.articles:revise: cd workflow_py && uv run contentflow articles revise
scripts.content:classify: cd workflow_py && uv run contentflow content classify
scripts.topic:audition: cd workflow_py && uv run contentflow topic audition
scripts.score:article-quality: cd workflow_py && uv run contentflow score article-quality
scripts.package:export: cd workflow_py && uv run contentflow package export
scripts.review:mark: cd workflow_py && uv run contentflow review mark
scripts.keywords:analyze: cd workflow_py && uv run contentflow keywords analyze
scripts.config:sync: cd workflow_py && uv run contentflow config sync
